title: collomia biflora var. soehrensii
intro: Collomia biflora var. soehrensii, also known as Soehrens' collomia, is a variety of the Collomia biflora plant species, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Collomia biflora var. soehrensii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
